rows.label: Frame Method
options: prefabricated wall frames and roof trusses

rows.label: Second Floor Timber Floor / Suspended Concrete
options: 319mm Timber Floor System (300mm I Beams & 19mm Sheet Flooring)
379mm Timber Floor System (360mm I Beams & 19mm Sheet Flooring)

rows.label: Third Floor Timber Floor / Suspended Concrete
options: 319mm Timber Floor System (300mm I Beams & 19mm Sheet Flooring)
379mm Timber Floor System (360mm I Beams & 19mm Sheet Flooring)

rows.label: Second level floor area total
rows.formula: SecondLevelFloorAreaM2 + SecondLevelGarageAreaM2 + SecondLevelAlfrescoAreaM2 + SecondLevelPorchAreaM2 + SecondLevelOtherAreaM2 + SecondLevelBalconyAreaM2

rows.label: Third level floor area total
rows.formula: ThirdLevelFloorAreaM2 + ThirdLevelGarageAreaM2 + ThirdLevelAlfrescoAreaM2 + ThirdLevelPorchAreaM2 + ThirdLevelOtherAreaM2 + ThirdLevelBalconyAreaM2

rows.label: Ceiling area
rows.formula: lowerFloorAreaM2 + lowerGarageAreaM2 + lowerAlfrescoAreaM2 + lowerOtherAreaM2 + upperFloorAreaM2 + upperGarageAreaM2 + upperAlfrescoAreaM2 + upperOtherAreaM2 + balconyAreaM2 + thirdFloorAreaM2 + thirdGarageAreaM2 + thirdAlfrescoAreaM2 + upperBalconyAreaM2

rows.label: Ground Level external wall internal finish
Second level external wall internal finish
Third level external wall internal finish
Ground Level total external wall area
Second level total external wall area
rows.excelFormula: total length of all second level external walls x (ceiling height + second level floor depth)

rows.label: Third level total external wall area
rows.excelFormula: total length of all third level external walls x (ceiling height + third level floor depth)

rows.label: Total external wall area before deductions
Ground Level window openings
rows.userNote: THIS NEEDS TO BE THE TOTAL AREA OF ALL WINDOWS ON THE GROUND LEVEL

rows.label: Second level window openings
rows.userNote: THIS NEEDS TO BE THE TOTAL AREA OF ALL WINDOWS ON THE SECOND LEVEL

rows.label: Third level window openings
rows.userNote: THIS NEEDS TO BE THE TOTAL AREA OF ALL WINDOWS ON THE THIRD LEVEL

rows.section: TOTAL NETT EXTERIOR WALL AREAS (WITH ALL OPENINGS DEDUCTED)
rows.label: TOTAL NETT EXTERIOR WALL AREAS (WITH ALL OPENINGS DEDUCTED)
Second level bulk exterior wall area
rows.excelFormula: total length of all second level external walls x (ceiling height + second level floor thickness)

rows.label: Third level bulk exterior wall area
rows.excelFormula: total length of all third level external walls x (ceiling height + third level floor thickness)

rows.label: Total External 70mm framed wall LM
rows.excelFormula: = ALL GROUND LEVEL 70MM EXTERNAL WALLS + SECOND LEVEL 70MM EXTERNAL WALLS + THIRD LEVEL 70MM EXTERNAL WALLS
rows.userNote: = ALL GROUND LEVEL 70MM EXTERNAL WALLS + SECOND LEVEL 70MM EXTERNAL WALLS + THIRD LEVEL 70MM EXTERNAL WALLS

rows.label: Total External 90mm framed wall LM
rows.excelFormula: = ALL GROUND LEVEL 90MM EXTERNAL WALLS + SECOND LEVEL 90MM EXTERNAL WALLS + THIRD LEVEL 90MM EXTERNAL WALLS
rows.userNote: = ALL GROUND LEVEL 90MM EXTERNAL WALLS + SECOND LEVEL 90MM EXTERNAL WALLS + THIRD LEVEL 90MM EXTERNAL WALLS

rows.label: Total Internal 70mm framed wall LM
rows.excelFormula: = ALL GROUND LEVEL 70MM INTERNAL WALLS + SECOND LEVEL 70MM INTERNAL WALLS + THIRD LEVEL 70MM INTERNAL WALLS
rows.userNote: = ALL GROUND LEVEL 70MM INTERNAL WALLS + SECOND LEVEL 70MM INTERNAL WALLS + THIRD LEVEL 70MM INTERNAL WALLS

rows.label: Total Internal 90mm framed wall LM
rows.excelFormula: = ALL GROUND LEVEL 90MM INTERNAL WALLS + SECOND LEVEL 90MM INTERNAL WALLS + THIRD LEVEL 90MM INTERNAL WALLS
rows.userNote: = ALL GROUND LEVEL 90MM INTERNAL WALLS + SECOND LEVEL 90MM INTERNAL WALLS + THIRD LEVEL 90MM INTERNAL WALLS

rows.label: Total Stud Material 70mm
rows.formula: GroundFloorStudMaterial70mmExternalLm + GroundFloorStudMaterial70mmInternalLm + SecondFloorStudMaterial70mmExternalLm + SecondFloorStudMaterial70mmInternalLm + ThirdFloorStudMaterial70mmExternalLm + ThirdFloorStudMaterial70mmInternalLm

rows.label: Total Stud Material 90mm
rows.formula: GroundFloorStudMaterial90mmExternalLm + GroundFloorStudMaterial90mmInternalLm + SecondFloorStudMaterial90mmExternalLm + SecondFloorStudMaterial90mmInternalLm + ThirdFloorStudMaterial90mmExternalLm + ThirdFloorStudMaterial90mmInternalLm

rows.label: Ground Level external plasterboard wall m2
Ground Level internal plasterboard wall m2
Second Level external plasterboard wall m2
Second Level internal plasterboard wall m2
Third Level external plasterboard wall m2
Third Level internal plasterboard wall m2
Ground Level Skirting LM
rows.userNote: Formular needs to be: if ground level =(brick veneer or Timber/Steel Framed with lightweight cladding or Mixed) then add =c55+(c56*2)

rows.label: Second level Skirting LM
rows.userNote: Formular needs to be: if ground level =(brick veneer or Timber/Steel Framed with lightweight cladding or Mixed) then add =c57+(c58*2)

rows.label: Third level Skirting LM
rows.userNote: Formular needs to be: if ground level =(brick veneer or Timber/Steel Framed with lightweight cladding or Mixed) then add =c59+(c60*2)

rows.label: Total lengths skirting
rows.userNote: skirting always comes in 5.4m lengths so the qty needs to be rounded up to the next full number

rows.label: Roof Type
rows.userNote: Drop down: Colorbond, Tiles, Shingle Tiles

rows.label: Roof Style
rows.userNote: Drop down: Hip & Valley, Gable, Skillion, Mixture

rows.label: Eaves width
rows.userNote: Drop down menu for .45 or .60 or .90

rows.label: Ground Level Plan Roofing Area
rows.formula: Ground Level roof plan = max(ground level total floor area - top level roof plan, 0)

rows.label: Second level Plan Roofing Area
rows.formula: Second level roof plan = second level total floor area

rows.label: Third level Plan Roofing Area
rows.formula: Third level roof plan = third level total floor area
